description_long: This house is a small, simple rectangular structure set on a flat, expansive base that resembles a plot of land or a foundation slab. The building itself is compact, with a boxy form and a flat roof, lacking any visible ornamentation or architectural detailing. The exterior is a muted, light gray color, contrasting with the larger olive-green base. There are no visible windows, doors, or other facade features, giving the house a minimalist and utilitarian appearance. The proportions suggest a single-story dwelling, possibly a modern micro-home or utility structure. The overall design is stark and functional, with a focus on geometric simplicity.
description: A small, boxy, single-story house with a flat roof, set on a large olive-green base and featuring a minimalist, windowless exterior.
description_view_0: Front view shows the house centered on a large olive-green base, with its flat roof and plain facade visible.
description_view_1: Side view reveals the house's rectangular shape and the depth of the base, with no additional features on the visible wall.
description_view_2: Rear view displays the back of the house, maintaining the same minimalist, windowless appearance.
description_view_3: Opposite side view highlights the house's compactness and the expanse of the base, with no distinguishing features.
attribute_entryway_design: Unadorned entryway, likely a flush door with no steps, porch, or decorative elements
